title: The First White Walkers: How They Were Created #got #shorts
description: The White Walkers were not always the enemy. They were created as a weapon—but became something far more dangerous. This is how the first of them came to exist. #WhiteWalkers #LongNight #GameOfThrones #Shorts

scenes.narration: The White Walkers were not born—they were created, forged in magic and fear by those trying to save themselves.
scenes.image_prompt: ritual deep in forest with glowing stones and ancient symbols, dark icy magic forming, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The Children of the Forest needed a weapon strong enough to stop the First Men’s relentless expansion.
scenes.image_prompt: Children of the Forest preparing ritual while First Men advance in distance, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: They chose a man, binding him to a weirwood tree and using ancient magic to change him forever.
scenes.image_prompt: man tied to weirwood tree during ritual, glowing roots and symbols, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: A shard of dragonglass was driven into his heart, turning life into something cold and unrecognizable.
scenes.image_prompt: dragonglass piercing chest, transformation beginning, icy glow spreading, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: His eyes turned blue, his body changed, and the first White Walker opened its gaze upon the world.
scenes.image_prompt: first White Walker opening glowing blue eyes, silent and terrifying, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: What was meant to be controlled quickly became something independent, driven by a purpose of its own.
scenes.image_prompt: White Walker standing apart from creators, cold authority, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: They did not remain alone—more were created, and soon, they began to spread beyond control.
scenes.image_prompt: multiple White Walkers forming in icy terrain, growing numbers, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Where they walked, the dead rose again, turning every battlefield into an army that never stopped growing.
scenes.image_prompt: wights rising from frozen battlefield under White Walker command, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The weapon became the threat, and the world faced a force that neither side had prepared for.
scenes.image_prompt: humans and Children watching advancing White Walkers in fear, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The first White Walker was not the end of a war—but the beginning of something far worse than either side imagined.
scenes.image_prompt: White Walker army stretching into horizon under dark sky, cinematic final, vertical 1080x1920
